cases.prompt_body: Tight subsystem close-up of a Therac-25 beam aperture and retaining ring, frame cropped below any housing label, blank off-white medical surface, bolts and inner cavity clearly readable, one empty mounting position where the X-ray target and flattening filter should be seated, faint cold internal glow deep in the aperture, no emitted beam, pale beige clinical background, institutional fluorescent light

styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents
styles.positive_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension, Tight subsystem close-up of a Therac-25 beam aperture and retaining ring, frame cropped below any housing label, blank off-white medical surface, bolts and inner cavity clearly readable, one empty mounting position where the X-ray target and flattening filter should be seated, faint cold internal glow deep in the aperture, no emitted beam, pale beige clinical background, institutional fluorescent light
